rationale: Logging verbosity improvement for updater thread; no spec behavior involved.
DBCursor.copy missing snapshot field; internal cursor copy bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Retry-on-SocketTimeoutException policy improvement; no specific spec rule violated, pre-dates retryable reads spec.
DBCursor.hint(DBObject) incorrectly converts hint to index name string; internal API bug, no cross-driver spec rule.
MapReduceCommand scope must be DBObject not String; Java API bug, no spec requirement referenced.
Maven artifact published to wrong directory; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Change default binary subtype from 2 to 0; pre-dates formal BSON spec, thin description, no spec rule cited.
Mongo.close() returns before cleanup thread finishes; thread lifecycle bug, no spec rule violated.
SlaveOK query returns no results when secondaries are stale; server-side staleness issue, not a spec nonconformance.
Dead connections not cleaned up on primary failover; internal connection management bug, no specific spec rule.
maven-metadata.xml missing from Maven Central; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Apache Felix OSGi manifest import issue; packaging/environment bug, no spec involvement.
Javadoc typo in BasicDBObject.append; documentation bug, no spec involvement.
JMX pool naming improvement; internal monitoring feature request, no spec involvement.
ConcurrentModificationException in _checkKeys; concurrency bug in internal key validation, no spec rule.
Add DB.authenticate(String, String) convenience overload; API ergonomics improvement, no spec requirement.
IllegalArgumentException race condition in updater thread start; concurrency/threading bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Binary subtype 0 and 2 should return byte array not Binary object; regression from JAVA-329, pre-formal BSON spec era.
Sockets for replica status checks not closed in Mongo.close(); resource leak bug, no spec rule violated.
Connector not started in constructor; regression bug from JAVA-362 fix, internal threading issue.
MinKey/MaxKey not representable in Java, decoded as String; missing BSON type support, predates formal BSON spec.
NPE when _rsStatus is null on IOException; null-check bug in error handling, no spec rule contradicted.
NPE in ReplicaSetStatus.ensureMaster due to concurrency; threading/initialization bug, no spec rule violated.
Make BSONDecoder overridable for lazy objects; internal API extensibility improvement, no spec requirement.
Improve Javadocs for connection options; documentation improvement, no spec involvement.
Date serialization/deserialization loses milliseconds; internal JSON utility bug, not a formal BSON/wire spec violation.
findOne with fields doesn't markAsPartialObject, allowing unsafe save; internal API flag bug, no spec rule.
Max connection retry time not configurable; internal configuration improvement, no spec requirement.
Driver rejects empty string keys; Java API validation bug, no spec rule requires rejecting empty keys.
JSON parser improvement to not require quoted keys; internal utility improvement, no spec involvement.
IPv4/IPv6 dual-address causes single server to be treated as replica set; OS-level address resolution bug.
DBAddress vs ServerAddress equality mismatch causes spurious master change; internal address comparison bug.
NPE in findOne regression from JAVA-387 fix; null-check omission, no spec rule contradicted.
MapReduceOutput reads from slave before sync with SlaveOK; replication-lag read consistency issue, no spec rule.
Poor concurrency in DBApiLayer.doGetCollection using synchronizedMap; performance/concurrency improvement, no spec rule.
LazyBSONObject doesn't handle DBRef; internal lazy decoding feature gap, no spec rule contradicted.
Publish Maven SNAPSHOT artifacts; build/packaging improvement, no spec involvement.
Add support for MongoDB 2.0 getLastError j/w fields; new server feature adoption, not a pre-existing nonconformance.
Allow BSON decoder per operation; internal API extensibility improvement, no spec requirement.
Allow inline map/reduce with SlaveOk to go to secondaries; feature improvement, no spec rule violated.
NPE in GridFSFile.validate when command returns null md5; null-check bug in GridFS, not a spec violation.
JSONParseException class not public; API visibility improvement, no spec involvement.
CommandResult applied to sub-objects of command responses; internal callback bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Intern ns field in DBRef for performance; internal performance optimization, no spec involvement.
Memoize field locations in LazyBSONObject; internal performance optimization, no spec involvement.
String.isEmpty() fails on JRE 1.5; Java version compatibility bug, no spec involvement.
Only 1 batch returned when batchSize and sort combined; cursor paging bug but no specific cursors spec rule cited.
DBPortPool not reusing sockets after maxSize reached; connection pool implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Embedded Map allows dot in key names; validation bug in key checking, no spec rule referenced.
Slave selection ignores latency limit; pre-dates server-selection spec, described as code-level logic error.
